checks.name: ESLint
checks.details: No errors; eight unrelated pre-existing warnings remain.

visual_checks.name: Global gutter alignment
visual_checks.details: At the 1280px large breakpoint, global brand, page title, and score all begin at x=64 and the score ends at x=1216.

visual_checks.name: Available-width fit
visual_checks.details: The rendered score has no horizontal overflow or alphaTab error.

visual_checks.name: Served responsive gutter classes
visual_checks.details: The song page uses the same px-6 md:px-10 lg:px-16 sequence as the global header.
